items.title: Staff Product Manager
items.description:
About Tekion:

Positively disrupting an industry that has not seen any innovation in over 50 years, Tekion has challenged the paradigm with the first and fastest cloud-native automotive platform that includes the revolutionary Automotive Retail Cloud (ARC) for retailers, Automotive Enterprise Cloud (AEC) for manufacturers and other large automotive enterprises and Automotive Partner Cloud (APC) for technology and industry partners. Tekion connects the entire spectrum of the automotive retail ecosystem through one seamless platform. The transformative platform uses cutting-edge technology, big data, machine learning, and AI to seamlessly bring together OEMs, retailers/dealers and consumers. With its highly configurable integration and greater customer engagement capabilities, Tekion is enabling the best automotive retail experiences ever. Tekion employs close to 3,000 people across North America, Asia and Europe.

Role Overview
We are seeking a senior, technically strong Product Manager to own platform capabilities across one of our 
engineering Scrum teams while driving customer-facing outcomes and continuous improvement. This role 
requires close collaboration with Engineering, AI, and platform teams, along with hands-on understanding of 
event-driven systems, agentic AI integration, scalable service design, and data-driven product development.


Key Responsibilities
• Own the product backlog for a Scrum team — writing clear, actionable user stories, acceptance criteria, and 
feature specifications aligned with business goals.
• Partner closely with Engineering and AI teams to deliver high-quality solutions across Java microservices, 
Kafka event pipelines, and agentic platform integrations.
• Collaborate with platform and infrastructure teams to ensure seamless integrations, well-defined data 
contracts, and API alignment.
• Track success metrics, adoption, and outcomes — iterating rapidly based on data and field feedback.
• Author Intent definitions, Skill specifications, and Policy configurations for the agentic platform layer (PRDas-Code approach).
• Design and maintain golden dataset scenarios used to validate intelligent capabilities before release.
• Drive change management and adoption of new features, tools, and platform capabilities.
• Build and maintain automations using workflow tools (Zapier or equivalent) to streamline internal processes.
• Demonstrate strong understanding of RESTful APIs, webhooks, and authentication mechanisms; 
troubleshoot integration issues hands-on.
• Work with data teams to define schemas, reporting views, and analytics instrumentation.
• Facilitate prioritization discussions, manage stakeholder expectations, and communicate trade-offs clearly 
across Engineering, Design, and Leadership.


Skills & Qualifications
• 6+ years of Product Management experience, preferably in platform, data-driven, or AI-enabled products.
• Strong experience collaborating with engineering teams on technical products — comfortable reading 
system designs, API specs, and data models.
• Proven analytical and problem-solving skills with a data-driven mindset; experience defining and tracking 
product KPIs.
• Hands-on experience with RESTful APIs, webhooks, and system integrations (ERP, CRM, data platforms, 
or cloud services).
• Familiarity with AI systems, LLM-based tools, and agentic AI patterns (intent routing, skill/policy design, 
MCP tools).
• Experience designing scalable, maintainable solution architectures in collaboration with engineering.
• Excellent verbal and written communication skills; strong stakeholder management across technical and 
non-technical audiences.
• Structured problem-solving and critical thinking; ability to navigate complex system trade-offs.
• Bachelor's or Master's degree in IT, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field.


Good to Have
• Experience authoring PRD-as-Code artifacts: Intent definitions, Skill specs, Policy configurations.
• Background in marketing technology, CDP, or customer data platforms.
• Experience with LMS platforms and user enablement programs.
• Prior experience in automotive retail or dealer technology.


Perks & Benefits
• Competitive compensation and generous stock options.
• Medical insurance coverage.
• Work with some of the brightest minds from Silicon Valley's most dominant and successful companies

 

Tekion is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, victim of violence or having a family member who is a victim of violence, the intersectionality of two or more protected categories, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. 

For more information on our privacy practices, please refer to our Applicant Privacy Notice here.

items.title: Product Manager - DB
items.description:
Job Title: Product Manager

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the  British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery. 

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.

 Key Skills: Experience - 10 years of experience in to own the delivery roadmap and client stakeholder relationships, with a financial services and AI/automation background.

If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

items.title: Associate Product Manager
items.description:
About Karya:

Why was Karya on the cover of the Time Magazine , highlighted by Satya Nadella , and chosen by Google as its partner for Project Vaani? 

In part, because Karya is on a mission to provide AI enabled earning and learning opportunities to economically underserved communities, thereby building a pathway out of poverty for them. Karya achieves this while also delivering high quality, timely, and price competitive data to its clients.

Karya’s workers make at least 20 times the Indian minimum wage and through our one-of-a-kind digital work platform, we have delivered over 40 million digital tasks and are poised to positively impact over 100 thousand workers by the end of the year. In the coming years, our goal is to rapidly scale our impact by bringing economic opportunities to millions of underserved users in India.

About the Role

We are looking for an Associate Product Manager who will work closely with cross-functional teams to build, improve, and scale products that deliver real user value. You will be involved in the end-to-end product lifecycle, from identifying opportunities to shipping features and measuring impact.

This role is ideal for someone early in their product career who is eager to learn, take ownership, and grow into a full Product Manager role.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Execution
    • Translate product requirements into clear PRDS/user stories and acceptance criteria
    • Work closely with engineering, design, and QA teams during sprint cycles
    • Track progress and ensure timely delivery of features
  • User Understanding
    • Conduct user research, interviews, and usability testing
    • Identify user pain points and translate them into actionable insights
  • Data & Metrics
    • Define and track key product metrics (e.g., engagement, retention, task completion)
    • Analyze data to inform product decisions and prioritization
  • Stakeholder Management
    • Collaborate with internal teams (Ops, Engineering, Design, Business)
    • Communicate product updates, timelines, and trade-offs clearly
  • Product Discovery
    • Assist in problem identification, solution ideation, and validation
    • Contribute to PRDs, feature specs, and product documentation
  • Continuous Improvement
    • Identify inefficiencies in product workflows and suggest improvements
    • Support experimentation (A/B testing, pilots, iterations)

Requirements

  • 1–3 years of experience in Product Management / Product Design / Engineering / other adjacent areas
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking
  • Basic understanding of product lifecycle and agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban)
  • Ability to break down ambiguous problems into structured solutions
  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills
  • Ability to take ownership of small features/modules independently
  • Comfort working with data (SQL is a plus)
  • Experience with tools like JIRA, Notion, Figma, or similar is a plus

Good to Have

  • Prior experience in a startup or fast-paced environment
  • Hands-on experience working in Agile/Scrum teams (participating in sprint planning, stand-ups, retros)
  • Exposure to end-to-end product lifecycle (idea → PRD → design → development → release → iteration)
  • Exposure to process improvement or automation (reducing manual ops effort)

What You’ll Gain

  • Hands-on experience across the full product lifecycle
  • Exposure to real world user problems and create real impact
  • Opportunity to work closely with senior leaders
  • A strong foundation to grow into a Product Manager role

What We Offer

  • Flexible leave and vacation policy
  • Hybrid work options
  • Insurance as per industry standards
  • Access to leaders in technology and social impact sectors
  • A chance to contribute meaningfully to AI, digital equity, and rural development

Karya celebrates diversity and is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will be considered without regard to race, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected status.

If you need accommodations to apply, please contact us at hr@karya.in

items.title: Sênior Product Manager
items.description:
📚  Feita de pessoas que transformam a educação 

Todas as vagas da Arco são elegíveis para Pessoas com Deficiência. 

 

Remoto
📚  Feita de pessoas que transformam a educação 

Todas as vagas da Arco são elegíveis para Pessoas com Deficiência. 

 

Somos Arcotech, time de tecnologia da Arco Educação. Desenvolvemos soluções digitais para que alunos, pais e escolas atuem em conjunto por um aprendizado mais dinâmico e efetivo.
 
Aqui reunimos talentos que têm paixão por tecnologia e educação. Sabemos que, juntos, somos capazes de unir as duas forças para elevar a experiência de aprendizagem. Queremos ir além da inovação, nosso propósito é potencializar o impacto da educação nas pessoas, é o que nos move.
 
Por meio de soluções de aprendizagem, estimativas e relacionamento, ajudamos as escolas a se tornarem melhores, maiores e mais encantadoras para os alunos, educadores e familiares.
 
#VEMPRAARCO 🧡 #VEMSERTECH
 
Agora que você já captou um pouco mais da nossa essência, vamos falar sobre a oportunidade?

👉 Quais serão os seus desafios com a gente?

  • Liderar a estratégia e evolução de um ou mais produtos críticos, com responsabilidade direta por impacto em métricas de negócio (engajamento, receita e satisfação);
  • Definir problemas relevantes e priorizar iniciativas com base em dados, contexto estratégico e necessidades dos usuários;
  • Conduzir discovery contínuo, estruturando hipóteses, experimentos e aprendizados junto a design e engenharia;
  • Garantir execução de alta qualidade, atuando próximo aos times para destravar decisões, reduzir riscos e acelerar entregas;
  • Alinhar stakeholders de diferentes áreas e níveis de senioridade, garantindo clareza de direcionamento e trade-offs;
  • Evoluir a governança e o modelo de operação dos produtos e canais sob sua responsabilidade;
  • Acompanhar e evoluir métricas de produto de ponta a ponta, ajustando estratégia conforme necessário;
  • Contribuir para o desenvolvimento do time e disseminação de boas práticas de produto.

 

👉 O que esperamos que você tenha:

  • Experiência liderando múltiplas iniciativas de produto, com histórico de entregas em cenários complexos e ambíguos;
  • Visão estratégica para pensar no médio e longo prazo, conectando a evolução dos produtos com os objetivos maiores da empresa;
  • Capacidade de evoluir a governança dos principais canais utilizados por diferentes perfis de usuário realizando uma gestão de stakeholders excelente com os times de domínio;
  • Habilidade afiada de comunicação e gestão de stakeholders — você adapta a mensagem, alinha expectativas com clareza, resolve conflitos com tranquilidade e domina alinhamentos assíncronos, construindo documentações objetivas que orientam decisões;
  • Ensino superior completo.

 

👉 Será um diferencial:

  • Experiência com ferramentas de inteligência artificial;
  • Experiência em times de Canais e/ou Plataformas.

 

 

O que você vai encontrar na Arco, além de pessoas incríveis:  

+ Auxílio alimentação e/ou refeição 
+ Plano de saúde e odontológico 
+ Vale transporte 
+ Licença maternidade e paternidade estendida 
+ Auxílio creche 
+ Cuidado com a saúde: parceria com a Wellhub e Zenklub
+ Incentivo à educação
+ Desconto em passagens aéreas 
+ Parceria com plano de saúde para Pet 
+ Acesso aos materiais didáticos Arco para filhos de colaboradores
+ Parcerias para MBA e Pós Graduação
 
#MaisDiversidade  
Acreditamos que em um ambiente diverso e inclusivo nossas pessoas serão mais felizes, engajadas e com mais chances de atingir o seu máximo potencial. Por isso, aqui na Arco, respeitamos e valorizamos a igualdade de direito, reconhecemos as singularidades e acreditamos que todas as pessoas podem contribuir para o nosso propósito. #VemPraArco

items.title: Principal Product Marketing Manager-Platform & Ecosystem
items.description:
Who We Are

Simpplr is the AI-powered intranet for unifying the digital workplace. It brings people, trusted knowledge, apps, and agents into a coherent digital experience. Powered by a proprietary EX Knowledge Graph, Simpplr synthesizes signals and context across connected systems to deliver personalized information and actions. The platform serves as a digital hub supporting communications, engagement, employee services, and work. With low-code extensibility and enterprise-grade security and governance, Simpplr enables confident operation at scale. More than 1,000 organizations — including AAA, the NHS, Penske, and Moderna — trust Simpplr to keep their workforce informed, aligned, and productive. Learn more at simpplr.com.

The Opportunity

Simpplr is a recognized leader in the digital workplace and employee experience space, with a rapidly expanding product portfolio and a vision to redefine how work happens. As we continue to scale, we’re hiring a Principal Product Marketing Manager to own Simpplr’s platform foundations and ecosystem, spanning the capabilities and services that enable enterprise customers to deploy, extend, and realize value from the platform at scale.

This role sits at the intersection of enterprise platform readiness and customer value realization, defining how Simpplr is deployed, governed, integrated, extended, and successfully operationalized across complex organizations. This seasoned PMM will elevate how Simpplr tells its story around enterprise platform services, extensibility, interoperability, ecosystem value, and professional services.

Reporting to the Director of Product Marketing, this role partners closely with Product, Partnerships, Services, Sales, and Enablement teams to craft powerful narratives and support launches and GTM programs.

Your Responsibilities

What you will be doing:

Enterprise Platform Foundations and Experience

  • Own the positioning, messaging, and storytelling for Simpplr’s horizontal platform services and experience (e.g., user provisioning, audiences and segmentation, access controls, accessibility).
  • Articulate how these foundational capabilities enable secure, personalized, scalable, and compliant employee experiences across the enterprise.
  • Develop value narratives that resonate with IT, security, and architecture stakeholders while clearly connecting platform services to usability, adoption, and business outcomes.
  • Position these capabilities as the foundation that enables enterprise adoption, extensibility, AI-driven experiences, and long-term platform scalability.

Integration and Extensibility

  • Own the positioning, messaging, and storytelling around Simpplr’s integrations and extensibility capabilities (e.g., pre-built integrations, app tiles, extensibility center, APIs).
  • Articulate how Simpplr connects with enterprise systems across HR, IT, collaboration, content, and line-of-business applications.
  • Develop differentiated stories that explain how customers extend, automate, and orchestrate work on Simpplr without heavy customization.

Partner and Ecosystem Marketing

  • Build and scale GTM narratives for Simpplr’s partner ecosystem, including technology partners, ISVs, and strategic alliances.
  • Collaborate with the Partnerships team to develop joint value propositions, partner playbooks, co-marketing assets, and field enablement resources.
  • Position Simpplr’s ecosystem as a force multiplier for platform value, extensibility, and customer outcomes.

Services and Customer Outcomes

  • Develop positioning and sales assets for Simpplr’s professional services, accelerators, packaged offerings, and implementation frameworks.
  • Partner with the Services organization to articulate ROI, customer impact, and the role services play in successful deployments.
  • Position professional services as a core lever for enterprise readiness and value realization, not just implementation.
  • Create customer-facing content that showcases methodology, best practices, and differentiated service delivery.

Go-to-Market Leadership

  • Support launch planning and execution across integrations, ecosystem partnerships, and services.
  • Create high-impact enablement resources including decks, one-pagers, battlecards, demos, and RFP-ready narratives.
  • Partner with Product to influence roadmap alignment with customer needs, partner requirements, and competitive trends.

Competitive and Analyst Support

  • Maintain a clear POV on differentiation across platform services, extensibility, ecosystem, and services.
  • Collaborate with Analyst Relations to ensure Simpplr’s platform and ecosystem story is accurately represented in key evaluations and reports.

Your Skillset

What makes you a great fit for the team:

  • 6+ years of product marketing experience in B2B SaaS or enterprise software, ideally with experience in platform services and/or integrations and extensibility frameworks.
  • Ability to translate complex technical and platform concepts into compelling, business-relevant value stories.
  • Experience positioning products for enterprise IT, security, and architecture stakeholders, and connecting platform readiness to business outcomes.
  • Experience partnering with Product, Partnerships, Services, and Sales to shape roadmap priorities, drive adoption, and support enterprise opportunities.
  • Strong understanding of enterprise sales cycles, RFP processes, and the needs of both business buyers and IT evaluators.
  • Proven ability to build high-quality technical and sales enablement content that supports product-led and partner-led deals.
  • Exceptional storytelling and communication skills, with the ability to connect platform-level capabilities to concrete customer outcomes.
  • Systems thinker who can connect platform foundations, extensibility, ecosystem, and services to Simpplr’s broader platform and AI story.
  • Curiosity and adaptability to quickly develop subject-matter expertise in areas such as identity, access control, APIs, enterprise integrations, and implementation methodology.

Benefits:

Simpplr provides a competitive compensation package along with full health, vision, and dental benefits. We believe in work-life integration and offer a flexible work environment. These benefits, coupled with an amazing team of individuals who believe in our mission and value openness, collaboration and teamwork, make Simpplr an incredible place to work.

 



Your Voice, Unfiltered:

We value the real you. To ensure a fair and authentic experience for everyone, we ask that you do not use AI tools (such as real-time answer generators, transcription apps, or note-taking bots) during your interview

Our process is designed to hear your unique story, thought process, and lived experience in real-time. Use of unauthorized AI tools may result in disqualification, as we want to ensure every candidate is evaluated on their own individual merits. We’re excited to meet the person behind the resume!

If you need assistive technology or AI tools for accessibility (e.g., live captioning), please notify your recruiter in advance. We are committed to providing an inclusive interview experience.

Simpplr’s Hub-Hybrid-Remote Model:

At Simpplr we believe that when work is good, life is better and that belief guides all we do. Including how we approach our flexible work model. Simpplr operates with a Hub-Hybrid-Remote model. This model is role-based with exceptions and provides employees with the flexibility that many have told us they want.

  • Hub - 100% work from Simpplr office. Role requires Simpplifier to be in the office full-time.
  • Hybrid - Hybrid work from home and office. Role dictates the ability to work from home, plus benefit from in-person collaboration on a regular basis. 
  • Remote - 100% remote. Role can be done anywhere within your country of hire, as long as the requirements of the role are met.

items.title: Product Support Manager
items.description:
CUBE are a global RegTech business defining and implementing the gold standard of regulatory intelligence for the financial services industry. We deliver our services through intuitive SaaS solutions, powered by AI, to simplify the complex and everchanging world of compliance for our clients. 

 

Why us?

🌍 CUBE is a globally recognized brand at the forefront of Regulatory Technology. Our industry-leading SaaS solutions are trusted by the world’s top financial institutions globally.

🚀 In 2024, we achieved over 50% growth, both organically and through two strategic acquisitions. We’re a fast-paced, high-performing team that thrives on pushing boundaries—continuously evolving our products, services, and operations. At CUBE, we don’t just keep up we stay ahead.

🌱 We believe our future is built by bold, ambitious individuals who are driven to make a real difference. Our “make it happen” culture empowers you to take ownership of your career and accelerate your personal and professional development from day one.

🌐 With over 700 CUBERs across 19 countries spanning EMEA, the Americas, and APAC, we operate as one team with a shared mission to transform regulatory compliance. Diversity, collaboration, and purpose are the heartbeat of our success.

💡 We were among the first to harness the power of AI in regulatory intelligence, and we continue to lead with our cutting-edge technology. At CUBE, You will work alongside some of the brightest minds in AI research and engineering in developing impactful solutions that are reshaping the world of regulatory compliance.

We’re looking for a Support Manager who is obsessed with customer experience and enjoys building support operations from the ground up.

You’ll own everything related to customer support—people, processes, metrics, and tools. From handling escalations to building a scalable support organization, you’ll ensure customers get fast, helpful, and human support while helping the company grow sustainably.

This role is ideal for someone who loves leading teams, solving real customer problems, and creating structure in fast moving environments.

This is a zero-to-one role where you’ll define and scale the support function, not just operate it.

What You’ll Do

Own Customer Support Operations

· Lead and manage the customer support function end to end

· Ensure timely, high quality resolution of customer tickets across chat, email, and other channels

· Take ownership of escalations and critical customer issues

· Maintain SLAs, CSAT, NPS, and support KPIs

· Build & Lead the Support Team

· Hire, train, coach, and scale a high performing support team

· Create a strong culture of customer empathy, accountability, and ownership

· Conduct regular performance reviews and skill building sessions

· Improve Processes & Scale

· Design and optimize support workflows, ticketing processes, and escalation paths

· Build repeatable, scalable systems that grow with the company

· Drive automation and self-service initiatives to reduce ticket volume

· Be the Voice of the Customer

· Act as a bridge between customers and Product/Engineering teams

· Share recurring issues, feature requests, and product feedback

· Partner with Product to improve usability and reduce support friction

· Ensure smooth handoff from Implementation to Support and maintain long-term customer satisfaction

· Reporting & Insights

· Track and analyze support metrics (CSAT, FCR, MTTR, backlog, etc.)

· Present insights and trends to leadership

· Use data to continuously improve support quality and efficiency

· How Success is Measured

· Customer satisfaction (CSAT) and Net Promoter Score (NPS)

· First response time (FRT) and mean time to resolution (MTTR)

· Ticket backlog and resolution efficiency

· Ticket deflection through self-service and automation

· Support cost per customer

What We’re Looking For:

· 5–9 years of experience in SaaS customer support, with at least 2+ years in a leadership role

· Hands on experience managing support teams in a startup or scale up environment

· Strong understanding of SaaS products, troubleshooting workflows, and customer lifecycles

· Experience with support tools like Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom, Jira, or similar

· Excellent communication, problem solving, and stakeholder management skills

· Comfortable working in ambiguity and moving fast

· Nice to Have (Not Mandatory)

· Experience supporting B2B or enterprise SaaS customers

· Exposure to 24x7 or global support models

· Experience working closely with Product and Engineering teams

Interested?

If you are passionate about leveraging technology to transform regulatory compliance and meet the qualifications outlined above, we invite you to apply. Please submit your resume detailing your relevant experience and interest in CUBE.​

CUBE is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

items.title: Product Management -  Director - Travel
items.description:
About Us:
Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology.

About the team:
Paytm Travel has revolutionized the travel industry - intending to empower millions of travelers who choose us as their preferred travel partner. Being one of the largest travel platforms in the country, we aim to not only ensure seamless, instant booking, but also a delightful journey. We strive to enrich the customer experience by making every transaction transparent, honest and hassle-free. To stay ahead of the curve, we are working aggressively towards our ambition to make travel affordable for all. With this customer centricity at our core, we strive to make Paytm Travel synonymous with trustworthy travel partners.


Job Summary
We are looking for a visionary and results-driven Director of Product to lead Paytm’s Travel business. This role will own the end-to-end product strategy and execution across travel categories, shaping how millions of users discover, book, and manage their journeys. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in the travel ecosystem, strong business acumen, and a proven ability to lead cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, high-impact products. You will drive growth, optimize customer experience, and build innovative solutions in partnership with engineering, design, and business teams.

Responsibilities
1. Define and drive the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Paytm Travel, aligning with overall business goals and growth targets.
2. Identify new opportunities across the travel ecosystem (flights, trains, buses, hotels) through market insights, customer needs, and competitive analysis.
3. Lead and mentor a team of product managers, fostering a high-performance and outcome-driven culture.
4. Partner closely with engineering, design, business, and external partners to deliver scalable, high-quality travel experiences.
5. Own key business metrics including conversion, retention, revenue, and customer satisfaction across the travel funnel.
6. Oversee end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to launch and continuous optimization at scale.
7. Drive data-informed decision-making by leveraging analytics, experimentation, and customer insights.
8. Collaborate with marketing, supply d operations teams to execute go-to-market strategies and unlock growth opportunities.
9. Build strong relationships with partners and stakeholders to enhance supply, pricing, and overall user experience.

Qualifications
1. 10+ years of experience in the travel industry (flights, trains, buses, hotels) with strong product leadership.
2. Deep understanding of travel booking flows, supply ecosystem, pricing, and post-booking experience.
3. Proven track record of building and scaling high-impact consumer travel products.
4. Strong analytical mindset with experience driving growth, conversion, and customer experience.
5. Excellent leadership and stakeholder management skills in fast-paced, cross-functional environments.


Why join us?
·         A collaborative output driven program that brings cohesiveness across businesses through technology
·         Improve the average revenue per use by increasing the cross-sell opportunities
·         A solid 360 feedback from your peer teams on your support of their goals
·         Respect, that is earned, not demanded from your peers and manager
 
Compensation: If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you. With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

items.title: Senior Product Marketing Manager- Employee Engagement & Frontline
items.description:
Who We Are

Simpplr is the AI-powered intranet for unifying the digital workplace. It brings people, trusted knowledge, apps, and agents into a coherent digital experience. Powered by a proprietary EX Knowledge Graph, Simpplr synthesizes signals and context across connected systems to deliver personalized information and actions. The platform serves as a digital hub supporting communications, engagement, employee services, and work. With low-code extensibility and enterprise-grade security and governance, Simpplr enables confident operation at scale. More than 1,000 organizations — including AAA, the NHS, Penske, and Moderna — trust Simpplr to keep their workforce informed, aligned, and productive. Learn more at simpplr.com.

The Opportunity

Simpplr is a recognized leader in the digital workplace and employee experience space, with a rapidly expanding product portfolio and a vision to redefine how work happens. As we continue to scale, we’re hiring a Senior Product Marketing Manager to own Simpplr’s employee voice, recognition, and frontline engagement experiences, driving insight, connection, and action across the workforce.

This role is responsible for the end-to-end go-to-market strategy and execution for these portfolio areas, including new innovations, feature evolution, and customer adoption. You will play a central role in shaping how these capabilities are brought to market, how they support customer outcomes, and how they contribute to Simpplr’s broader platform strategy.

Reporting to the Director of Product Marketing, this role partners closely with Product, Sales, Enablement, and Customer teams to drive successful launches and sustained market impact.

Your Responsibilities

What you will be doing:

Portfolio Ownership and Go-to-Market Leadership

  • Own the end-to-end go-to-market strategy and execution for Simpplr’s employee voice, recognition, and frontline engagement portfolios.
  • Lead planning and execution for new innovations and major enhancements, from early product shaping through launch, enablement, and adoption.
  • Partner with Product to influence roadmap priorities and ensure market readiness for upcoming releases.
  • Develop and maintain the core enablement assets required to support selling, expansion, and competitive differentiation, including decks, one-pagers, demos, battlecards, and RFP-ready narratives.
  • Partner with Sales, Enablement, and Customer teams to support active opportunities, frontline-heavy deployments, and expansion motions within your portfolio.

Cross-Functional and Market Leadership

  • Serve as the primary product marketing point of contact for your portfolio across Product, Sales, Enablement, Customer Success, and Analyst Relations.
  • Maintain an up-to-date understanding of customer needs, market dynamics, and competitive activity across employee engagement, listening, recognition, and frontline solutions.
  • Support analyst briefings, evaluations, and inquiries related to your areas of ownership.

Your Skillset

What makes you a great fit for the team:

  • 4+ years of product marketing experience in B2B SaaS or enterprise software.
  • Demonstrated experience owning go-to-market execution for products or portfolios, including launches, enablement, and adoption.
  • Strong ability to partner cross-functionally with Product, Sales, Enablement, and Customer teams.
  • Experience supporting enterprise sales cycles and complex buying environments.
  • Proven ability to create effective enablement assets that drive understanding and impact in the field.
  • Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution across multiple initiatives.
  • Experience or strong interest in employee engagement, recognition, HR technology, or workforce platforms.
  • Familiarity with selling to HR, Internal Communications, Operations, or frontline leadership audiences.
  • Experience supporting or marketing to frontline-heavy enterprise organizations is a plus.

Benefits:

Simpplr provides a competitive compensation package along with full health, vision, and dental benefits. We believe in work-life integration and offer a flexible work environment. These benefits, coupled with an amazing team of individuals who believe in our mission and value openness, collaboration and teamwork, make Simpplr an incredible place to work.

 



Your Voice, Unfiltered:

We value the real you. To ensure a fair and authentic experience for everyone, we ask that you do not use AI tools (such as real-time answer generators, transcription apps, or note-taking bots) during your interview

Our process is designed to hear your unique story, thought process, and lived experience in real-time. Use of unauthorized AI tools may result in disqualification, as we want to ensure every candidate is evaluated on their own individual merits. We’re excited to meet the person behind the resume!

If you need assistive technology or AI tools for accessibility (e.g., live captioning), please notify your recruiter in advance. We are committed to providing an inclusive interview experience.

Simpplr’s Hub-Hybrid-Remote Model:

At Simpplr we believe that when work is good, life is better and that belief guides all we do. Including how we approach our flexible work model. Simpplr operates with a Hub-Hybrid-Remote model. This model is role-based with exceptions and provides employees with the flexibility that many have told us they want.

  • Hub - 100% work from Simpplr office. Role requires Simpplifier to be in the office full-time.
  • Hybrid - Hybrid work from home and office. Role dictates the ability to work from home, plus benefit from in-person collaboration on a regular basis. 
  • Remote - 100% remote. Role can be done anywhere within your country of hire, as long as the requirements of the role are met.

items.title: Senior/Staff Product Manager
items.description:
Saviynt's AI-powered identity platform manages and governs human and non-human access to all of an organization's applications, data, and business processes. Customers trust Saviynt to safeguard their digital assets, drive operational efficiency, and reduce compliance costs. Built for the AI age, Saviynt is today helping organizations safely accelerate their deployment and usage of AI. Saviynt is recognized as the leader in identity security, with solutions that protect and empower the world’s leading brands, Fortune 500 companies and government institutions. For more information, please visit www.saviynt.com.

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

    ● Define the Strategy: Build and execute a strategic product roadmap that aligns directly with the company's broader business objectives.
    ● Lead Cross-Functional Execution: Partner with engineering, UX/UI, and internal stakeholders to prioritize features, develop user stories, and drive the timely delivery of high-quality software.
    ● Author Clear Requirements: Translate complex ideas into clear, concise, and actionable product requirements, feature specifications, and acceptance criteria.
    ● Champion the User Experience: Master existing product functionality and deeply analyze customer pain points to design solutions that users actually love.

    ● Optimize Product Quality: Drive the defect triage process, analyzing issue trends to ensure product stability strictly aligns with customer expectations.
    ● Empower Go-to-Market Teams: Enable sales, marketing, and customer success with the training and insights needed to drive successful launches and rapid product adoption.
    ● Accelerate Delivery: Continuously monitor and analyze agile/scrum metrics to optimize team velocity and improve execution.
    ● Innovate Continuously: Monitor industry trends, competitive landscapes, and emerging technologies to drive market differentiation and keep the platform ahead of the curve.

WHAT YOU BRING

    ● Education: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field.
    ● Experience: 5 to 7 years of Product Management/Product Owner experience with a proven track record of delivering successful software products.
    ● Technical Fluency: Requires advanced SQL skills and the ability to seamlessly translate and discuss technical requirements with engineering teams.
    ●Product Methodologies: Deep expertise in agile development, product management frameworks, and growth initiatives like A/B testing and experimentation.
    ● Analytical & Design Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities to drive data-backed decisions, combined with a solid understanding of UX/UI best practices.
    ● Global Collaboration: Exceptional communication and leadership skills, with the flexibility to work across multiple global time zones with diverse stakeholders.
    ● Preferred: Domain knowledge in IAM, IGA, or PAM.
    ●Preferred: Understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and experience with at least one major cloud provider (AWS, GCP, or Microsoft Entra).
If required for this role, you will:
- Complete security & privacy literacy and awareness training during onboarding and annually thereafter
- Review (initially and annually thereafter), understand, and adhere to Information Security/Privacy Policies and Procedures such as (but not limited to):

> Data Classification, Retention & Handling Policy
> Incident Response Policy/Procedures
> Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery Policy/Procedures
> Mobile Device Policy
> Account Management Policy
> Access Control Policy
> Personnel Security Policy
> Privacy Policy

Saviynt is an amazing place to work. We are a high-growth, Platform as a Service company focused on Identity Authority to power and protect the world at work. You will experience tremendous growth and learning opportunities through challenging yet rewarding work which directly impacts our customers, all within a welcoming and positive work environment. If you're resilient and enjoy working in a dynamic environment you belong with us!

Saviynt is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome everyone to our team.  All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.

items.title: Product Manager - Anaplan Excel
items.description:
At Anaplan, we are a team of innovators focused on optimizing business decision-making through our leading AI-infused scenario planning and analysis platform so our customers can outpace their competition and the market.

What unites Anaplanners across teams and geographies is our collective commitment to our customers’ success and to our Winning Culture.

Our customers rank among the who’s who in the Fortune 50. Coca-Cola, LinkedIn, Adobe, LVMH and Bayer are just a few of the 2,400+ global companies who rely on our best-in-class platform.

Our Winning Culture is the engine that drives our teams of innovators. We champion diversity of thought and ideas, we behave like leaders regardless of title, we are committed to achieving ambitious goals, and we love celebrating our wins – big and small.

Supported by operating principles of being strategy-led, values-based and disciplined in execution, you’ll be inspired, connected, developed and rewarded here. Everything that makes you unique is welcome; join us and let’s build what’s next - together!

Team Description

The Enterprise Experience team is responsible for all aspects of the end-user interface at Anaplan. This includes planning templates, analytical grids, pixel-perfect reporting and interactive dashboards. The product areas we deliver are foundational and are touched by every customer and used in every Application and implementation. Reporting to the Director, Product Management for Enterprise Experience, this person will be based in our India office in Gurugram, and will be instrumental in the execution of our product and company strategy

Your Impact:

  • Help define and evolve the direction for Anaplan’s Enterprise Experience, specifically Anaplan’s Excel Add In.
  • Drive the product roadmap in partnership with engineering, ensuring delivery of high-impact capabilities for our customers.
  • Develop specifications, standards, and design principles for a consistent user experience.
  • Engage with customers and Anaplan CoEs to foster relationships and assimilate feedback and improvement opportunities into roadmap.
  • Support cross-functional alignment across engineering, product, and strategy teams.
  • Drive end-to-end experiences: writing user stories with clear acceptance criteria, working with UX to create prototypes for usability testing and research, working with engineering, documentation, support, and marketing to deliver quality experiences. 

Your Qualifications:

  • Experience as a Product Manager in a B2B SaaS or enterprise software environment.
  • Ability to define and manage complex product roadmaps and technical requirements.
  • Excellent Microsoft Excel skills.
  • Proven experience with reporting and analytics tools, and a good understanding of business reporting requirements.
  • Experience collaborating closely with engineering teams in an Agile environment.
  • Excellent communication, documentation, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Strategic thinker with the ability to translate vision into execution.
  • Any experience with multidimensional databases would be an advantage.

This is a high-impact opportunity for the right candidate to shape the future of Anaplan’s Excel extension for new and existing customers.

Our Commitment to Diversity, Equity, Inclusion and Belonging (DEIB)

We believe attracting and retaining the best talent and fostering an inclusive culture strengthens our business. DEIB improves our workforce, enhances trust with our partners and customers, and drives business success. Build your career in a place where diversity, equity, inclusion and belonging aren’t just words on paper – this is what drives our innovation, it’s how we connect, and it contributes to what makes us a market leader. We believe in a hiring and working environment where all people are respected and valued, regardless of gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, age, neurodiversity, disability status, citizenship, or any other aspect which makes people unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day! 

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, perform essential job functions, and receive equitable benefits and all privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.  

Fraud Recruitment Disclaimer  

It has come to our attention that fraudulent and fictitious job opportunities are being circulated on the Internet. Prospective candidates are being contacted by certain individuals, mainly through telephone calls, emails and correspondence, claiming they are representatives of Anaplan. The main purpose of these correspondences and announcements is to obtain privileged information from individuals.  

Anaplan does not:  

  • Extend offers to candidates without an extensive interview process with a member of our recruitment team and a hiring manager via video or in person.   
  • Send job offers via email. All offers are first extended verbally by a member of our internal recruitment team whenever possible and then followed up via written communication.  

All emails from Anaplan would come from an @anaplan.com email address. Should you have any doubts about the authenticity of an email, letter or telephone communication purportedly from, for, or on behalf of Anaplan, please send an email to people@anaplan.com before taking any further action in relation to the correspondence.

items.title: Senior Product Manager - Sparks
items.description:
InMobi Advertising is a global technology leader helping marketers win the moments that matter. Our advertising platform reaches over 2 billion people across 150+ countries and turns real-time context into business outcomes, delivering results grounded in privacy-first principles. Trusted by 30,000+ brands and leading publishers, InMobi is where intelligence, creativity, and accountability converge. By combining lock screens, apps, TVs, and the open web with AI and machine learning, we deliver receptive attention, precise personalization, and measurable impact.

Through Glance AI, we are shaping AI Commerce, reimagining the future of e-commerce with inspiration-led discovery and shopping. Designed to seamlessly integrate into everyday consumer technology, Glance AI transforms every screen into a gateway for instant, personal, and joyful discovery.  Spanning diverse categories such as fashion, beauty, travel, accessories, home décor, pets, and beyond, Glance AI delivers deeply personalized shopping experiences. With rich first-party data and unparalleled consumer access, it harnesses InMobi’s global scale, insights, and targeting capabilities to create high impact, performance driven shopping journeys for brands worldwide.

Recognized as a Great Place to Work, and by MIT Technology Review, Fast Company’s Top 10 Innovators, and more, InMobi is a workplace where bold ideas create global impact. Backed by investors including SoftBank, Kleiner Perkins, and Sherpalo Ventures, InMobi has offices across San Mateo, New York, London, Singapore, Tokyo, Seoul, Jakarta, Bengaluru and beyond.

At InMobi Advertising, you’ll have the opportunity to shape how billions of users connect with content, commerce, and brands worldwide. To learn more, visit www.inmobi.com

We're building the next-generation rewarded gaming platform — casual games fused with an AI-driven coin economy and rewarded ad monetization. This is a 0→1 build with real P&L ownership, not roadmap management. You'll ship fast, own the numbers, and shape a product that already reaches 40M+ users in the US. 

What you'll own:

  • Virtual Economy Design — Architect the coin/token economy end-to-end: earn loops, spend sinks, inflationary controls, and rewarded-ad triggers that keep players engaged without killing LTV. 
  • Monetization & Revenue — Own the full P&L. Set ad pricing strategy, experiment with AI/ML-driven dynamic pricing, and hit aggressive revenue targets. 
  • Product-Led Growth — Drive activation, retention, and re-engagement across 40M+ users through gameplay loops, rewards calibration, and smart notifications. 
  • 0→1 Roadmap — Define and ruthlessly prioritize the product roadmap from first playable through scaled operations. Ship weekly, learn daily. 
  • SDK & Platform — Work with engineering to evolve the mobile SDK for game developers and ad partners, ensuring seamless integration and performance.
  • Cross-functional Leadership — Partner with game design, data science, ad-tech, and business teams across InMobi and Glance to align on outcomes, not just output. 

What You Bring:

  • 6–8+ years in Product Management, with meaningful time in gaming, consumer tech, or ad-tech. 
  • Virtual economy or rewarded loop experience — you've designed token systems, gacha mechanics, battle-pass economies, or equivalent reward structures and can speak fluently about sinks, faucets, and inflation curves. 
  • AI/ML fluency — you've shipped features involving dynamic pricing, recommendation engines, or ML-driven personalization. You can collaborate deeply with data scientists. 
  • Mobile SDK & ad monetization knowledge — you understand waterfall vs. bidding, ad mediation, ROAS, and eCPM optimization in the mobile ecosystem. 
  • Builder mindset — you thrive in ambiguity, operate with a strong bias for action, and have a track record of shipping fast in resource-constrained, high-autonomy environments.
  • Analytical rigor — you're deeply comfortable with data, can build your own analyses, and tie product decisions to revenue and engagement KPIs. 

Bonus Points:

  • Experience in casual/hyper-casual gaming studios (e.g., Zynga, Voodoo, Playtika, Scopely). 
  • Hands-on work with rewarded video, offerwall, or playable ad formats. 
  • Previous 0→1 or early-stage product launches with P&L accountability. 
  • Familiarity with Glance-style lock-screen or ambient distribution models. 
  • Tech You'll Touch 
  • AI/ML Pricing Models · Mobile Ad SDKs · Rewarded Video · In-App Economies · Real-Time Bidding · A/B & Multivariate Testing · Engagement Analytics · LTV/ROAS Modeling 
  • This isn't a "manage the backlog" PM role. If you want to own a business inside a business — with real distribution, real revenue, and real autonomy — let's talk. 

The InMobi Culture

At InMobi, culture isn’t a buzzword; it's an ethos woven by every InMobian, reflecting our diverse backgrounds and experiences.

We thrive on challenges and seize every opportunity for growth. Our core values — thinking big, being passionate, showing accountability, and taking ownership with freedom — guide us in every decision we make.

We believe in nurturing and investing in your development through continuous learning and career progression with our InMobi Live Your Potential program.

InMobi is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and is committed to providing reasonable accommodations to qualified individuals with disabilities throughout the hiring process and in the workplace.

Visit https://www.inmobi.com/company/careers to better understand our benefits, values, and more!

items.title: Sr. AI Product Manager
items.description:
Cyara is the global leader in AI-powered customer experience assurance, committed to eradicating bad CX. As the only unified platform for continuous testing and monitoring across voice, digital, messaging, and conversational AI channels, Cyara empowers hundreds of the world’s leading brands to optimize more than 350 million customer journeys every year. With enterprises rapidly deploying agentic AI systems that adapt, learn, and make autonomous decisions in real time, Cyara provides the assurance layer that turns pilots into production-ready deployments—testing AI agents with AI agents to catch what scripts can’t. From full journey visibility to AI governance, trust validation, and compliance, Cyara ensures every touchpoint works flawlessly and every AI interaction solves customer problems while delighting them in the process. Cyara helps businesses deliver secure, friction-free, and high-quality CX at scale. Interested to find out more about us?  Check out:  www.cyara.com

Cyara’s Values: 
At Cyara, our values shape everything we do. We're passionate about Delivering Excellence by putting the customer first, collaborating globally, and always striving to improve. We take smart risks and Innovate Boldly, setting new standards and learning from every experience. Integrity First is our cornerstone—we value humility, authenticity, and respect for diversity, building trust in all we do. We Embrace Curiosity by empowering you to experiment, learn, and grow in a dynamic environment. At Cyara, our values drive us forward, shaping a culture where innovation and excellence thrive. 

Cyara’s Diversity, Equity, Inclusive and Belonging: 
At Cyara, we are dedicated to fostering a workplace that embodies equal opportunity and champions diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB). We strive to cultivate an environment where every individual feels valued, respected, and empowered to bring their whole selves to work, contributing unique perspectives and talents. Our commitment includes continuously evaluating and enhancing our policies, practices, and culture to align with our DEIB principles. We ensure a discrimination-free environment where individuals are evaluated solely on their merits and abilities, regardless of legally protected statuses such as sex, race, color, ethnicity, national origin, age, religion, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, or medical condition. By celebrating our differences and championing inclusivity, we enrich our organization, make more thoughtful decisions, and drive collective success. 

Role Overview

The AI Product Manager will own the strategy, roadmap, and execution of AI-driven testing and assurance capabilities, with a strong focus on conversational AI systems (voice and chat bots), agentic workflows, and AI evaluation frameworks.

This role focuses on translating complex, real-world challenges in AI-driven customer interactions into scalable, market-leading solutions that help enterprises validate autonomous AI behavior, ensure trust, and optimize performance at scale.

You will act as a product leader, customer advocate, and cross-functional collaborator, driving measurable outcomes while advancing Cyara’s agentic CX assurance platform vision.

Key Responsibilities

    Product Strategy and Vision

    • Define and evolve the product strategy aligned with Cyara’s agentic platform vision
    • Develop and maintain a clear, outcome-driven roadmap
    • Continuously assess market trends in LLMs, conversational AI, and autonomous agents, identifying opportunities to differentiate

      • Customer and Market Leadership

      • Engage directly with customers building AI voice and chat bots to understand real-world challenges in testing, scaling, and trust
      • Act as the voice of the customer, translating issues like:
        • Silent failures in conversations
        • Multi-turn breakdowns
        • Performance at scale (e.g., thousands of concurrent calls)

          • into actionable product requirements

          • Partner with sales, pre-sales, and customer success teams in strategic engagements and demos

            • Product Delivery and Execution

            • Own the end-to-end product lifecycle from problem definition through delivery and iteration
            • Collaborate closely with engineering, AI/ML, and architecture teams to build agentic testing/monitoring features
            • Drive backlog prioritization

              • Go-to-Market and Enablement

              • Enable sales and marketing teams with clear positioning
              • Support product launches, demos, and customer-facing narratives
              • Partner with enablement teams to ensure adoption of new AI capabilities

Experience and Qualifications:

    • 5–10 years of product management experience, ideally in AI, developer platforms, or SaaS products
    • Hands-on experience with conversational AI and/or CCaaS platforms
    • Strong understanding of LLM-based systems, prompt orchestration, and agent workflows preferred
    • Experience with testing frameworks, QA systems, or developer tooling preferred
    • Ability to operate in fast-paced, ambiguous environments and drive clarity
    • Strong communication skills with the ability to influence cross-functional teams

Why You’ll Love Working at Cyara

    • Mission with impact – Help enterprises build AI systems customers can trust
    • Category leadership – Define the emerging space of Agentic CX assurance
    • Real product ownership – Build foundational capabilities for AI testing and trust
    • Cutting-edge problem space – Work at the intersection of AI, CX, and large-scale systems
    • Room to grow – Shape not just products, but the future of AI assurance
Agencies: Thanks but we’ve got this one!  Please, no phone calls or emails to any employees of Cyara outside of the Talent Acquisition team.  Cyara’s policy is to only accept resumes from Agencies via the Cyara Agency Portal. Agencies must have a valid fee agreement in place and they must have been assigned the specific requisition to which they submit resumes, by the Cyara Talent Acquisition team before submitting any CV's. Any resume submitted outside of this process will be deemed the sole property of Cyara and, in the event, a candidate is submitted outside of this policy is hired, no fee or payment of any kind will be paid

items.title: Senior AI Product Manager
items.description:
We are looking for an experienced AI Product Manager who can operate at the intersection of product, technology, client engagement, and execution. This is a high-ownership, enterprise-facing role for someone who is excited by the opportunity to shape cutting-edge AI applications, work directly with international clients, and translate complex business problems into scalable AI-enabled products.

The AI Product Manager will lead the definition, shaping, and execution of enterprise AI products and features for global clients. This role requires a rare mix of product judgment, AI fluency, consulting maturity, and hands-on problem solving. You will work closely with clients, engineering teams, designers, and delivery leaders to identify opportunities, define product direction, manage expectations, and bring AI-first solutions to life.

The ideal candidate understands how to apply GenAI and agentic patterns in enterprise contexts, is comfortable navigating ambiguity, and is hands-on enough to prototype ideas, validate concepts quickly, and sharpen requirements through action. This is not a purely roadmap or coordination role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, engage credibly with clients, and get into the detail when needed.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own the product definition and execution of enterprise AI applications, workflows, and features from discovery through release and adoption.
  • Work directly with clients and internal stakeholders to identify business problems, frame opportunities, and convert them into clear product requirements and delivery plans.
  • Shape AI-first user experiences, including copilots, assistants, agentic workflows, decision-support tools, and human-in-the-loop enterprise applications.
  • Translate ambiguous business needs into structured product artifacts such as problem statements, user journeys, PRDs, acceptance criteria, prioritization frameworks, and release scope.
  • Partner closely with engineering, UX, architecture, and delivery teams to ensure product intent is translated into practical, scalable solutions.
  • Drive workshops, requirement discovery sessions, stakeholder reviews, demos, and alignment discussions with enterprise clients and senior stakeholders.
  • Build lightweight prototypes, proof-of-concepts, and product mock flows using modern AI tools, no-code/low-code methods, vibe coding, and basic design/prototyping techniques where useful.
  • Help define and refine AI use cases involving agents, orchestration, retrieval, workflow automation, and enterprise system integration.
  • Maintain a sharp eye for detail across business requirements, product behavior, user experience, and delivery quality.
  • Manage client expectations proactively by balancing ambition, technical feasibility, timelines, and delivery realities.
  • Support value realization and account growth by identifying follow-on product opportunities, expansion areas, and innovation pathways within client accounts.
  • Contribute to a product and delivery culture that values speed, clarity, experimentation, accountability, and customer impact.

What Success Looks Like in This Role

  • Enterprise AI products and features are clearly defined, well-prioritized, and shipped with strong adoption potential.
  • Clients see you as a credible product partner who understands both business value and execution constraints.
  • Product requirements are crisp, actionable, and reduce ambiguity for delivery teams.
  • AI use cases move beyond demos into usable workflows that solve real operational problems.
  • Teams make faster, better decisions because product direction, scope, and trade-offs are well managed.
  • Client confidence improves through strong communication, attention to detail, and disciplined expectation management.
  • You help create momentum for account expansion by spotting practical product and AI opportunities that clients want to invest in.
    • 7–14 years of experience in ProApplication formDesign the application form for this role.duct Management, Business Analysis, Consulting, Enterprise Software, Digital Products, or related technology roles.
    • Demonstrated experience working on software products, platforms, or enterprise applications in client-facing environments.
    • Good understanding of AI/ML and Generative AI concepts, with practical exposure to AI-enabled product design and delivery.
    • Exposure to building or shaping agent-based / agentic workflows or AI-driven assistants/copilots in a product or solution context.
    • Strong experience in requirements discovery, user story definition, prioritization, stakeholder management, and cross-functional execution.
    • Ability to engage confidently with enterprise clients, business users, engineering teams, and senior internal stakeholders.
    • Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complexity and present with clarity.
    • High attention to detail and the ability to manage product quality and client expectations in parallel.
    • A hands-on mindset with the willingness to prototype, experiment, and validate ideas quickly rather than rely only on documentation.
    • Comfort working in ambiguous, fast-evolving environments where AI capabilities, client needs, and product direction are still being shaped.

Preferred Qualifications

    • Prior experience in a consulting or client advisory environment is highly desirable.
    • Exposure to enterprise domains and business applications is preferred.
    • Experience supporting farming-led account expansion, identifying opportunities within existing accounts, or helping grow strategic client relationships is a strong plus.
    • Background as a Software Engineer or strong technical foundation is preferred.
    • Familiarity with enterprise workflow systems, platform integrations, business process automation, or complex multi-stakeholder applications is a plus.
    • Experience creating basic prototypes independently using AI coding tools, prompt-based development, wireframing, or lightweight design tools.
    • Strong educational background from top-tier institutions is preferred, including IIMs, IITs, BIT Mesra, BITS Pilani, top NITs, or equivalent institutions.

Skills and Capability Areas

    • AI product thinking and practical GenAI application
    • Agentic workflow understanding and AI feature conceptualization
    • Enterprise product management and requirements rigor
    • Client-facing communication and consulting maturity
    • Hands-on prototyping, experimentation, and validation
    • Cross-functional collaboration with engineering, UX, and delivery
    • Strong execution discipline and attention to detail
    • Commercial awareness and account growth mindset

Who Will Thrive Here

    • You are likely to thrive in this role if you are someone who enjoys building in fast-moving environments, likes solving messy enterprise problems, and can move comfortably between strategy and execution. You are structured but not rigid, hands-on but not narrow, and client-focused without losing product depth. You bring ownership, curiosity, and pragmatism. You know how to earn trust in a room, ask the right questions, and turn ambiguity into action.
    • You should also enjoy working at the frontier of enterprise AI, where the best solutions require not only product thinking and technical awareness, but also judgment, experimentation, and strong partnership with clients and delivery teams.

Why Join Accellor

This is an opportunity to play a meaningful role in shaping real enterprise AI products, not just internal experiments or slideware. At Accellor, you will work on cutting-edge AI applications for global clients, solve complex business problems, and build products that matter in real operating environments.

  • You will gain exposure to international clients, cross-functional teams, and high-impact business contexts. You will have the opportunity to influence both product direction and delivery outcomes, while building deep experience in one of the most important technology shifts underway today.
  • For the right candidate, this role offers a strong platform for growth across AI product management, enterprise transformation, consulting, and global client leadership.

Location / Working Model

This role is based in Hyderabad or Bangalore. Travel may be required based on client and project needs.

Reporting Structure

This role reports to the Head of Global Delivery and will work closely with leadership across Product, Engineering, Design, Delivery, and Client Engagement.

Exciting Projects: We focus on industries like High-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.

Collaborative Environment: You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global centers.

Work-Life Balance: Accellor prioritizes work-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.

Professional Development: Our dedicated Learning & Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training, Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.

Excellent Benefits: We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Personal Accident Insurance, Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonus

items.title: Senior Product Manager (Ads)
items.description:
JOB SUMMARY: 

As a Senior Product Manager, collaborate closely with senior leaders to shape a dynamic product strategy that drives ads, business, and product objectives. This role will want you to define the Ads Experience for JHS users, keeping a high bar on user engagement and managing business expectations. This role will involve working with business, tech, analytics stakeholders, and managing upward communication with leadership. Ads Experience is at the heart of user experience - this role will be critical in driving a delightful user experience along with opening up incremental supply for business.

ABOUT THE TEAM: 

JioHotstar’s Ad Platform is among the top Video Advertising Platforms in India and our aspiration is to make it the largest Video Advertising Platform because no one knows Video-On-Demand, Live Sports and Ads like our Ad Tech team does. The AdTech team builds out innovative Ad formats and generates supply, sources demand through various channels including managed, programmatic, self-serve etc, serves targeted ads at large scale during live events and on on demand videos, drives measurement solutions and outcomes for advertisers. The pace of our growth is incredible and we’re building our entire ads platform in-house.

JOB SUMMARY: 

As a Senior Product Manager, collaborate closely with senior leaders to shape a dynamic product strategy that drives ads, business, and product objectives. This role will want you to define the Ads Experience for JHS users, keeping a high bar on user engagement and managing business expectations. This role will involve working with business, tech, analytics stakeholders, and managing upward communication with leadership. Ads Experience is at the heart of user experience - this role will be critical in driving a delightful user experience along with opening up incremental supply for business.

ABOUT THE TEAM: 

JioHotstar’s Ad Platform is among the top Video Advertising Platforms in India and our aspiration is to make it the largest Video Advertising Platform because no one knows Video-On-Demand, Live Sports and Ads like our Ad Tech team does. The AdTech team builds out innovative Ad formats and generates supply, sources demand through various channels including managed, programmatic, self-serve etc, serves targeted ads at large scale during live events and on on demand videos, drives measurement solutions and outcomes for advertisers. The pace of our growth is incredible and we’re building our entire ads platform in-house.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Conduct thorough research and analysis to generate actionable insights and determine ROI

  • Translate abstract problem statements into clear requirements by assessing market trends and shifts

  • Influence roadmaps within and outside the functional area to enhance the overall ecosystem

  • Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, contributing to roadmaps and prioritization beyond the immediate domain

  • Show agility in responding to external signals, enabling swift roadmap adjustments, and ensuring transparent communication of impacts

  • Take ownership of at least one key KPI that directly aligns with Product Objectives and Key Results

  • Develop deep expertise in at least one functional area, driving strategic advancements through innovation and transformation

  • Actively participate in team-building initiatives, including contributing to hiring processes

SKILLS & ATTRIBUTES FOR SUCCESS:

  • Communicate clearly and effectively, with precise articulation and logical progression of ideas

  • Apply structured frameworks and logical thinking to address complex problems, asking the right questions for deeper understanding

  • Demonstrate a diverse range of ideas and prioritize effectively, focusing on the end outcomes

  • Leverage a data-driven mindset to derive insights from metrics and make well-informed product decisions

  • Show strong user empathy, using structured problem-solving to address pain points through hypothesis-building and solution development

  • Benchmark competitors and validate findings through experimentation, maintaining high standards for product roadmap inclusion

  • Confidently tackle ambiguous problems with minimal supervision, taking decisive action across the organization

  • Foster a collaborative, respectful work environment, open to feedback, while mentoring junior PMs to success and effectively influencing without formal authority

PREFERRED EDUCATION & EXPERIENCE:

    Bachelors/Masters degree or equivalent preferred. Overall  4-6 years of experience in building scalable consumer products
About Us
Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media & entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.

 JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.

items.title: Product Management - Associate - Telco
items.description:
About Paytm Group:

Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology.

About the Role: 

We are looking for a highly driven and strategic professional to lead Telco partnerships and 
growth initiatives at Paytm. This role will be responsible for driving telecom collaborations, 
scaling recharge/bill payments, and unlocking new revenue streams through deep operator 
integrations. 

Key Responsibilities: 

1. Support the product team in managing the end-to-end product lifecycle, from ideation to launch and iteration.
2. Work on telecom use cases such as mobile recharges, DTH, bill payments, and subscription services.
3. Collaborate with engineering, design, marketing, and operations teams to define and execute product requirements.
4. Analyze user data, funnel metrics, and drop-offs to identify areas of improvement.
5. Assist in creating product requirement documents (PRDs), user stories, and workflows.
6. Participate in product testing (UAT) to ensure smooth feature releases.
7. Track product performance using KPIs such as conversion rate, success rate, retention, and engagement.
8. Conduct market research and competitor benchmarking to understand industry trends.
9. Gather and interpret user feedback to improve user experience and reduce friction points.

Requirements: 

0 - 2 years of experience in telecom, fintech, or digital payments 
Strong understanding of telco ecosystem (recharges, plans, APIs, billing systems) 
Proven experience in partnerships, category growth, or product management. 
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 
Excellent stakeholder management and negotiation skills. 

Why join us?
   
A collaborative output driven program that brings cohesiveness across businesses through technology· Improve the average revenue per use by increasing the cross-sell opportunities· A solid 360 feedback from your peer teams on your support of their goals·Respect, that is earned, not demanded from your peers and manager 

Compensation:

If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth for you With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 17 mn+ merchants and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!
